ModMetaData.name: PurePatcher
ModMetaData.description:
Prepatcher is a powerful library for mod developers and a mod manager.

Includes Harmony v2.4.2 and PrepatcherAPI v1.2.0

The version for RimWorld 1.5 includes Harmony v2.3.3 and PrepatcherAPI v1.2.0

The version for RimWorld 1.4 includes Harmony v2.2.2 and PrepatcherAPI v1.2.0
ModMetaData.author: Zetrith, Vortex
